--- title: "Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes ratio" author: - name: Muluh --- ## Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes ratio ::: {.cell} ::: ### Group-wise comparisons - **Taxonomic level:** Phylum - **Group variable:** diet - **Multiple testing correction:** fdr - **Statistical test** Wilcoxon ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ratio_files/figure-pdf/visualize-plot-1.png){fig-align='center'} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: #### Table of the top findings #### Across-group ##### Before treatment - Multiple testing correction: **fdr** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrrl} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-before}Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes before Treatment}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes before Treatment \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot oat & rice & 0.32 & 0.29 & -0.12 & 0.41\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ##### After treatment - Multiple testing correction: **fdr** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrrl} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-after}Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes after Treatment}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes after Treatment \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot oat & rice & 0.33 & 0.33 & -0.02 & 0.68\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ratio_files/figure-pdf/viz-div_change-1.png){fig-align='center'} ::: ::: #### Within-group ##### Paired treatment - Multiple testing correction: **fdr** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrr} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-paired}Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes paired between timepoint (1 and 2)}\\ \toprule \textbf{diet} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.value}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of Bacteroidetes/Firmicutes paired between timepoint (1 and 2) \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{diet} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.value}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot rice & 0.29 & 0.33 & 1.07 & 0.37\\ oat & 0.32 & 0.33 & 0.28 & 0.80\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ### LMM ::: {.cell} ::: -
